title: teclea utilis
intro: Teclea utilis, also known as the African dogwood or yellow dogwood, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Teclea utilis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Teclea utilis can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
